# Feature: Monorepo scaffold

<!-- auto-generated by @implement — issue #1 -->

## Intent

Bootstrap Cargo workspace + npm workspaces per architecture doc so later issues can land code in the right packages.

## Happy Path
- [ ] Root `Cargo.toml` workspace with `crates/core`, `crates/plugin`
- [ ] npm workspaces: `packages/guest`, `packages/sdk`, `packages/inspector-app`
- [ ] Placeholder `examples/react-vite`, `examples/vanilla`
- [ ] `bench/` directory stub
- [ ] Synchronized version `0.1.0` across crates/packages
- [ ] `npm run checks` passes

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Feature flag `visual-inspector` exists on plugin crate
- [ ] `crates/core` has no Tauri dependency

## Regression
- [ ] Existing docs unchanged except README structure note if needed

## Assumptions
- Rust stable + Node 20 available locally

## Implementation Notes
- Root `Cargo.toml` workspace: `crates/core`, `crates/plugin` @ 0.1.0
- npm workspaces: guest, sdk, inspector-app + example placeholders
- `visual-inspector` feature flag on plugin crate (empty commands in build.rs for now)
- `cargo test --workspace` + `npm run typecheck` pass
